rationale: Both reviews would push the PR away from out-of-scope placeholder Layer 6 definitions with `True` fields, bundled smoothness, and a naïve unipotence definition, all of which are confirmable in the diff. Review 2 is slightly better because it also catches the scope-relevant misuse of `GroupLike k A` despite the file already defining `AlgPoints`, so following it would more fully prevent the wrong abstraction from entering the PR.
